pr.title: gr: fix Zebes Route param store
pr.author: itsgrimetime

summary: PR #2502 updates src/melee/gr/grzebesroute.c to model grZe_Route_804D6A60 as an 8-byte Zebes Route parameter store, with a params pointer and pad field, and names two understood route parameters: camera_timer and zako_spawn_chance. The PR body says this brought grzebesroute data sections including .sbss to 100%; the bot report specifically records a new .sbss match for main/melee/gr/grzebesroute from 50% to 100% with +4 bytes.

key_files.role: Only changed source file; introduces grZebesRoute_Params and grZebesRoute_ParamStore, changes grZe_Route_804D6A60 from an anonymous pointer-style struct to a concrete param-store object, and updates uses to named fields.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: adds grZebesRoute_Params with camera_timer and zako_spawn_chance
raw_diff: adds grZebesRoute_ParamStore with params pointer and u32 pad
raw_diff: replaces anonymous static pointer grZe_Route_804D6A60 with grZebesRoute_ParamStore grZe_Route_804D6A60

what_changed.text: Added typedef grZebesRoute_Params containing int camera_timer and int zako_spawn_chance.
Added typedef grZebesRoute_ParamStore containing grZebesRoute_Params* params and u32 pad, matching the PR body's description of an 8-byte Zebes Route param store.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: model grZe_Route_804D6A60 as the 8-byte Zebes Route param store

what_changed.text: Changed grZe_Route_804D6A60 from an anonymous pointer to a concrete grZebesRoute_ParamStore global.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: removed static anonymous struct pointer grZe_Route_804D6A60

what_changed.text: Updated initialization in grZebesRoute_8020B164 to store Ground_801C49F8() into grZe_Route_804D6A60.params instead of assigning the global directly.
Updated uses of the old x4 field in grZebesRoute_8020B1F4 to grZe_Route_804D6A60.params->zako_spawn_chance, including the HSD_Randi argument.
Updated use of the old x0 field in grZebesRoute_8020B3C0 to grZe_Route_804D6A60.params->camera_timer when assigning gp->gv.zebes2.xC4.
Reported data-section improvement: PR body claims grzebesroute data sections including .sbss are 100%; bot report records .sbss for main/melee/gr/grzebesroute moving from 50% to 100% with +4 bytes.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: bring grzebesroute data sections, including .sbss, to 100%

smart_moves.text: Recovered a small data-store shape rather than leaving the symbol as an anonymous pointer with x0/x4 fields.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: anonymous struct pointer replaced with grZebesRoute_ParamStore
human_pr_text: model grZe_Route_804D6A60 as the 8-byte Zebes Route param store

smart_moves.text: Named only the currently understood parameter fields, camera_timer and zako_spawn_chance, while retaining an address-style name for the global grZe_Route_804D6A60.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: name the currently understood route params (`camera_timer`, `zako_spawn_chance`)

smart_moves.text: Used a pad member in the store struct to model the observed 8-byte storage without inventing an unsupported second semantic field.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grZebesRoute_ParamStore has grZebesRoute_Params* params and u32 pad

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a stage global is actually a small store containing a parameter pointer plus unused or unknown storage, model the store explicitly instead of treating the global itself as the parameter pointer.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grZe_Route_804D6A60 changed from anonymous pointer to grZebesRoute_ParamStore
raw_diff: Ground_801C49F8() now stored in grZe_Route_804D6A60.params

decomp_lessons.lesson: Recovering a real container type can improve data-section matching while also making parameter field accesses more readable.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: bring grzebesroute data sections, including .sbss, to 100%
raw_diff: x0/x4 accesses replaced with camera_timer/zako_spawn_chance

naming_conventions.name: grZebesRoute_Params
naming_conventions.convention: Stage-specific type name with grZebesRoute prefix and Params suffix for route parameter data.

naming_conventions.name: grZebesRoute_ParamStore
naming_conventions.convention: Stage-specific type name with ParamStore suffix for a wrapper/global storage object that contains a params pointer and padding.

naming_conventions.name: camera_timer
naming_conventions.convention: Semantic field name used for former x0 parameter when assigned to gp->gv.zebes2.xC4.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: name the currently understood route params (`camera_timer`, `zako_spawn_chance`)

naming_conventions.name: zako_spawn_chance
naming_conventions.convention: Semantic field name used for former x4 parameter controlling the HSD_Randi spawn-chance path.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: name the currently understood route params (`camera_timer`, `zako_spawn_chance`)

naming_conventions.name: grZe_Route_804D6A60
naming_conventions.convention: Address-style global name retained; PR did not rename it to a speculative semantic global name.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Represented grZe_Route_804D6A60 as an 8-byte struct in storage, with the first word as params pointer and the second word as u32 pad.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grZebesRoute_ParamStore fields params and pad
human_pr_text: model grZe_Route_804D6A60 as the 8-byte Zebes Route param store

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used typed field access through grZe_Route_804D6A60.params to replace raw x0/x4-style accesses.
Focused on data-section closure for this translation unit; bot report confirms .sbss gained a new match.

Verification commands are author-reported in the PR body; the loaded bot report independently supports only the .sbss data-match improvement shown in the issue comment.
The PR body claims all grzebesroute data sections are 100%, while the bot excerpt specifically enumerates the .sbss improvement; this intake does not independently validate other data sections.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Model small parameter stores explicitly when evidence shows the global is a wrapper, not the pointed-to parameter data
accepted_candidate_records.text: In grzebesroute, grZe_Route_804D6A60 was changed from an anonymous parameter pointer with x0/x4 fields into grZebesRoute_ParamStore, an 8-byte store whose first word is a grZebesRoute_Params* and whose second word is padding. Uses now access grZe_Route_804D6A60.params->camera_timer and ->zako_spawn_chance. The PR body and bot report connect this type recovery to data-section/.sbss matching progress.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: model grZe_Route_804D6A60 as 8-byte Zebes Route param store

accepted_candidate_records.title: Name only understood fields while leaving uncertain globals address-style
accepted_candidate_records.text: This PR names the understood parameter fields camera_timer and zako_spawn_chance but keeps the global as grZe_Route_804D6A60. That pattern fits conservative naming: add semantics where field usage and PR evidence support it, without inventing a semantic global name.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: name the currently understood route params

source_update_candidates.title: grzebesroute.c owns Zebes Route param-store modeling around grZe_Route_804D6A60
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2502 changed src/melee/gr/grzebesroute.c so grZe_Route_804D6A60 is modeled as grZebesRoute_ParamStore, an 8-byte store containing grZebesRoute_Params* params and u32 pad; known parameter fields are camera_timer and zako_spawn_chance.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: model grZe_Route_804D6A60 as the 8-byte Zebes Route param store
source_update_candidates.reason: May be useful as a source-owned path fact for future work in this file, but should be reviewed against current source before promotion.

source_update_candidates.title: Prefer explicit wrapper structs over mis-typed globals when small data storage includes a pointer plus unknown padding
source_update_candidates.text: This PR provides an example where modeling a global as an explicit wrapper struct with a pointer and padding improved readability and .sbss matching. Curator may consider whether this should become an example under typed-fields-over-pointer-math or data-sections-and-tu-splits, not a new standalone rule unless similar cases recur.
source_update_candidates.reason: The lesson aligns with existing standards, but one PR slice is not enough to establish a broad new global standard without curator review.

rejection_notes: Do not generalize from this PR that all stage parameter globals should be modeled as 8-byte ParamStore wrappers; the evidence is specific to grzebesroute and grZe_Route_804D6A60.
Do not claim full independent verification of the author-reported ninja commands from the loaded slice; only the bot .sbss report is directly present.
Do not infer reviewer intent or review acceptance rationale; no review comments or review records are loaded.
